title: Louis Zulli
text: Home * People * Louis Zulli Louis Philip Zulli , an American mathematician and associate professor at department of mathematics, Lafayette College , Easton, Pennsylvania , with special interests in knot theory , low-dimensional topology and linear algebra over Z/2Z [1] . He holds a Ph.D. from Cornell University in 1993 under Allen Hatcher , where he introduced a way to calculate the Jones polynomial [2] of a knot using a symmetric matrix , called the trip matrix, over Z/2Z [3] . His none professional interests include chess and chess programming, in particular open source engines for the Apple Macintosh such as Crafty and Stockfish , parallel search topics, and writing his own engine Kirby [4] [5] .
